title: Low framerate collaboration
description:
After a long time of not having led a collaboration based on my own ideas (before that I asked other people if I may lead their very inactive collaborations), here we have a experimental collaboration. The idea is pretty simple: to make a video remix on a low framerate up to 20 fps.

Participants (in order of apperance):

- MaggedRat (10 fps)
- iamoutofideas (19 fps)
- materatzowy (8 fps)
- gimpnipples (2 fps)
- waymuu (6 fps)
- ImmaCornflakes (8,5 fps)
- Herpywhooves (10 fps)
- ToneDeafCP (20 fps)
- FreddieKrueger91527 (6 fps)
- me (9 fps)
- PikalaxALT (5 fps)
- wtfFletchie (7 fps)
- TheRaz0rEdge (7,1 fps)
- Hachidorey (12,5 fps)

Thanks to the participants for contributing!

Sony Vegas 6 project file of my video: http://www.mediafire.com/?73q11pa0zo6j4qd
